Container.Overview: Automatically creates and deletes UniFi local DNS CNAME records when Docker containers start or stop on unRAID. Containers with a dedicated macvlan IP get a CNAME pointing to your Nginx Proxy Manager host. Containers without a dedicated IP are silently ignored. On startup, all already-running containers are synced automatically.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket for listening to container events. Must be read-only.

Config.Name: UniFi Host
Config.Description: URL of your UniFi Gateway (e.g. https://192.168.11.1)

Config.Name: UniFi API Key
Config.Description: UniFi API Key. Create one in UniFi → Settings → Control Plane → Integrations.

Config.Name: UniFi Site
Config.Description: UniFi site name. Usually 'default' for single-site setups.

Config.Name: Domain
Config.Description: Your internal domain. Container names become subdomains (e.g. plex.kroll-home.de).

Config.Name: NPM CNAME Target
Config.Description: FQDN that all CNAMEs point to. Should be your Nginx Proxy Manager A-record.

Config.Name: Skip Networks
Config.Description: Comma-separated Docker network names to ignore (containers without dedicated IPs).

Config.Name: Skip Containers
Config.Description: Comma-separated container names to never create DNS entries for.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR
